India's Earthing & Lightning Protection Manufacturer

Engineering a safer ground
for India's infrastructure

Bombay Earthing House manufactures Copper Bonded Earth Rods, Pipe Electrodes, Lightning Arresters, Earth Plates, Cable Trays and a full range of earthing accessories — built to IS, IEC & BS standards, trusted by 550+ clients worldwide.

About Us

ISO 9001 certified manufacturer — built on consistent quality

Bombay Earthing House has earned a reputation as one of India's most reliable manufacturers of earthing electrodes and lightning protection products. Every product is backed by technical documentation, rigorous in-house testing and a commitment to on-time delivery from our Mumbai facility.

More About Us
Quality

ISO 9001:2008 Certified

Every product tested before despatch. Test certificates with every order.

550+

Satisfied Clients

Long-term relationships built on consistent quality and honest service.

600+

Projects Completed

From single electrode supplies to complete earthing system packages.

40+

Expert Professionals

Manufacturing, quality control, sales and logistics specialists.

Industries We Serve

Trusted across India's industries

Power Plants

Oil & Gas

Chemical Industry

Automobile

Telecom Towers

Railway

Solar & Wind

Manufacturing
